name: everything-githubcopilot
description: GitHub Copilot customization pack for VS Code with repository instructions, file-based instructions, prompt files, custom agents, hooks, and skills

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  Everything GitHub Copilot installed.
  Active customizations live under .github/.
  Codex CLI compatibility is project-local; see README.md for .codex and .agents/skills setup.
  This package does not manage ~/.codex/skills.
  Validate with: npm run validate
  Docs: README.md and docs/migration-status.md
'
scripts.lint:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path rust/semantic-indexer/Cargo.toml --all --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path rust/semantic-indexer/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test:hooks: node tests/hooks/codebase-entry-points.test.js && node tests/hooks/db.test.js && node tests/hooks/learn-embed.test.js && node tests/hooks/observe-tool.test.js && node tests/hooks/phase6-benchmark.test.js && node tests/hooks/phase6-runner.test.js && node tests/hooks/post-edit-hooks.test.js && node tests/hooks/safety-backup.test.js && node tests/hooks/session-start.test.js && node tests/hooks/session-stop-knowledge.test.js && node tests/hooks/shared.test.js && node tests/hooks/skill-router.test.js && node tests/hooks/skill-router-embeddings.test.js && node tests/hooks/tool-call-correction.test.js && node tests/hooks/verification-eval.test.js
scripts.test:installer: node tests/installer/manifest.test.js && node tests/installer/cli.test.js && node tests/installer/project-setup.test.js && node tests/installer/project-bootstrap.test.js
scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run test:ci && npm run test:hooks && npm run test:installer
